## Debouncer.cancel() method

Cancels pending invocation of cb

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
cancel(): void;
```
<b>Returns:</b>

void

## Example


```ts
const debounced = new Debouncer(a => console.log(a), 3, 4)
debounce.trigger('first')
debounce.cancel()
// console.log will not be invoked
```
